folio.label: 127r
folio.l: For whom ful ofte , in gret perile he was
Ne had he ben holpen , by the Steede of Bras
And after wol I spekemspekenspeke&i;&i;&i; , of kambalo
That faugút in listes , witú the bretheren two
For Canacee , or that he mygút hire wynne
And there I lefte , I wol a ©ein begynne
¢ Here enditú the Squyeres tale , as meche as Chaucer made
